ksa_text: Skill in conducting AI cost-risk analysis and impact assessment, including evaluating monetary and non-monetary costs of AI errors, assessing impact likelihood and magnitude, and characterizing societal and individual impacts.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to AI Transparency and Documentation Specialist scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk analys", "impact assess"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working AI Transparency and Documentation Specialist self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in AI Transparency and Documentation Specialist work (domain affinity 0.85, 2 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.

decision_rationale: Included: skill maps directly to AI Transparency and Documentation Specialist scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk analys", "impact assess").
